# AI Finora
> AI Finora is an AI-powered accounting and bookkeeping platform for growing
businesses, startups, accounting firms, and industry-specific operators. It
combines automated bookkeeping, financial reporting, invoicing, cash-flow
tracking, month-end close workflows, and human finance expertise.
- [Homepage](https://www.aifinora.com/): Overview of AI Finora's AI accounting
software and bookkeeping services.
- [About AI Finora](https://www.aifinora.com/about-us/): Company background,
mission, and team.
- [B2B Bookkeeping](https://www.aifinora.com/b2b/real-time-bookkeeping/):
Automated bookkeeping for business financial workflows.
- [Financial Reporting](https://www.aifinora.com/b2b/financials/): Financial
reports and dashboards for business decisions.
- [Month-End Close](https://www.aifinora.com/b2b/month-end-close/): Month-end
close automation and reconciliation support.
- [Contact](https://www.aifinora.com/contact-us/): Contact AI Finora at
sales@aifinora.com or +1 828-367-0905.
